##LOCALITY=Shijiangshan mine, Linxi, Chifeng, Inner Mongolia, China
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Mineral Zone
##DESCRIPTION=White aggregate of prismatic or elongated bladed crystals with striations. Crystals are twinned with a two-fold rotation along [0 -1 1]*.
